proposal.hypothesis: Expose PPO to both measured failures while halving residual authority and exploration so it can learn corrections without overriding the spatial program prior.
proposal.expectedEffect: Recover strong-push survival and improve low-friction signed progress without adding spatial-generalization or motion-quality violations.

gateReasons: reset-b: survival regressed from passing to failing
actuator-delay: lateral-drift regressed from passing to failing
spatial-generalization: delay-plus-push: survival regressed from passing to failing
motion-quality: delayed-forward: actuator-saturation regressed from passing to failing
